phase: TB-18R R6 evidence (PPUT_RESULT-absent; external SIGKILL on 600s timeout)
tb_18r_substrate_evidence: TB-18R failure-path symmetry repair empirically validated: chain accumulated 50 real LLM-Lean cycle rejections with fine-grained R3 RejectionClass {LeanFailed=6, ParseFailed=7, SorryBlocked=8, LlmError=9} discriminators. Pre-TB-18R: these would have leaked to evaluator stdout / kernel.tape shadow with no chain-side externalization (matching M1 VETO-trigger pattern).
r4_invariant_equation_evaluable_reason: Evaluator killed mid-run by external 600s timeout before emitting PPUT_RESULT; evaluator_reported_completed_llm_calls is unavailable from a SIGKILL-d process. The chain side is fully populated (50 records) and structurally correct.
r4_substrate_correctness_witness: Per R4 unit tests (tests/tb_18r_chain_attempt_invariant.rs 10 tests covering all 6 RunOutcome halt classes including WallClockCap with attempt_aborted_count > 0), the equation evaluates correctly under controlled conditions. The runtime infra constraint (600s per-problem timeout for hard problems with 50+ LLM cycles) is the limiting factor for full equation observation; not a structural defect.
remediation_for_full_observation: Re-run with --per-problem-timeout-s 1800 (30 min) or higher to give evaluator room to complete + emit PPUT_RESULT.
